docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-19-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO PROVIDE FURTHER EVIDENCE.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-08-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-08-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF NOMVULA O'MEARA IS PRESENT. WITNESS ROBERT FREEMAN TESTIFIES ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY L. ROBINSON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'MEARA, NOMVULA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAFEWAY $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-18-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2019 - CONTINUED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH FURTHER EVIDENCE TO OCT-8-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NOMVULA O'MEARA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY ROBINSON, CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SHOWS THE COURT PICTURES ON HER IPAD OF PURCHASE RECEIPT AND HER INJURIES. DEFENDANT PLAYS FOR THE COURT A RECORDING OF THE 911 INCIDENT CALL FROM HIS CELL PHONE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
